parsed.recommendation_text: For gaming, the JBL Tune 770NC offers a solid balance of features and affordability. With basic noise cancellation, it helps block out distractions during intense gaming sessions. Its 44-hour battery life ensures long playtimes without needing frequent recharges. The punchy sound signature is well-suited for dynamic game audio, enhancing immersion. While the build quality is plastic-heavy, its $79.95 price point makes it an excellent value proposition.
parsed.selection_rationale: Best balance of features and affordability.
